'''wajatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyogranuloma|pyogranuloma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyogranuloma|pyogranuloma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wajatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjæthæth|wæjæthæth]] || [[word:wæjæthæj|wæjæthæj]] || [[word:wæjæthæsh|wæjæthæsh]] || [[word:wæjæthæ|wæjæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajajathath|wajajathath]] || [[word:wajajathaj|wajajathaj]] || [[word:wajajathash|wajajathash]] || [[word:wajajatha|wajajatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajathath|wajathath]] || [[word:wajathaj|wajathaj]] || [[word:wajathash|wajathash]] || [[word:wajatha|wajatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajafthath|wajafthath]] || [[word:wajafthaj|wajafthaj]] || [[word:wajafthash|wajafthash]] || [[word:wajafthaf|wajafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajathatha|wajathatha]] || [[word:wajathaja|wajathaja]] || [[word:wajathasha|wajathasha]] || [[word:wajathaka|wajathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajathath|wajathath]] || [[word:wajathaj|wajathaj]] || [[word:wajathash|wajathash]] || [[word:wajatha|wajatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajathathal|wajathathal]] || [[word:wajathajal|wajathajal]] || [[word:wajathashal|wajathashal]] || [[word:wajathakal|wajathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajathathatha|wajathathatha]] || [[word:wajathajaja|wajathajaja]] || [[word:wajathashasha|wajathashasha]] || [[word:wajathaka|wajathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajathathan|wajathathan]] || [[word:wajathajan|wajathajan]] || [[word:wajathashan|wajathashan]] || [[word:wajathakan|wajathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajathathaoro|wajathathaoro]] || [[word:wajathajaoro|wajathajaoro]] || [[word:wajathashaoro|wajathashaoro]] || [[word:wajathakaoro|wajathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
